title: Copilot Eval Configuration
description: Configuration file for copilot-eval eval cases with optional setup/teardown hooks.

oneOf.description: Legacy format: a bare array of eval cases.

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON schema for editor validation.

scripts.description: Global setup/teardown shell commands. Setup runs once before all evals (in the project directory). Teardown runs once after all evals. Supports placeholders: {{runId}}, {{runDir}}, {{projectDir}}. Variables also available as COPILOT_EVAL_* env vars.

evals.description: List of eval cases to run.

setup.description: Shell command to run before. Supports {{placeholder}} syntax and COPILOT_EVAL_* env vars.

teardown.description: Shell command to run after. Supports {{placeholder}} syntax and COPILOT_EVAL_* env vars.

setup:eval.description: Default shell command to run before each eval. Overridden by per-eval scripts.setup. Supports {{placeholder}} syntax and COPILOT_EVAL_* env vars.

teardown:eval.description: Default shell command to run after each eval. Overridden by per-eval scripts.teardown. Supports {{placeholder}} syntax and COPILOT_EVAL_* env vars.

title.description: Short descriptive title for the eval case.

scripts.description: Per-eval setup/teardown shell commands. Runs in the project directory. Supports placeholders: {{runId}}, {{runDir}}, {{projectDir}}, {{workspaceId}}, {{workspaceDir}} (alias: {{workspacePath}}). Variables also available as COPILOT_EVAL_* env vars.

turns.description: One or more conversation turns for this eval.

prompt.description: The user prompt to send to the Copilot CLI.

expected.description: Description of the expected behavior for judging.
